# Inkspirations Studios Portfolio

> AI-readable access file for ChatGPT and other assistants.

Public portfolio URL: https://rm337.github.io/markdown-portfolio/
Artist: Robert Marleton
Studio: Inkspirations Studios
Focus: digital artwork, hand-lettering, ocean-inspired creative systems, music rooms, and interactive studio environments.

## How to access

Use the public homepage at https://rm337.github.io/markdown-portfolio/. The visual portfolio is embedded in the public JavaScript file for reliable GitHub Pages display. This file provides a clean text summary for assistants that cannot efficiently parse large embedded image data.

## Selected Portfolio Pieces

1. Infinite Love
   Medium: Lettering Study
   Collection: Selected Works
   Availability: Portfolio review
   Description: Layered script, saturated color, and a strong central mark give this piece the feeling of a studio signature. The work keeps the message direct while letting texture and light carry the surface.

2. Do Not Despair
   Medium: Wood / Lettering
   Collection: Selected Works
   Availability: Portfolio review
   Description: A circular wood-based statement piece shaped by grain, pressure, and a hand-finished surface. The wording is direct, but the material gives it a grounded, weathered presence.

3. Sunflower Mandala
   Medium: Pattern Study
   Collection: Selected Works
   Availability: Portfolio review
   Description: A radial composition built from blue, gold, and petal-like repetition. The piece sits between ornament, symbol, and decorative surface design.

4. Blue Field
   Medium: Texture Study
   Collection: Selected Works
   Availability: Portfolio review
   Description: A close study of blue surface, grain, and directional movement. It works as a quiet counterpoint to the more message-driven pieces in the collection.

5. Love, Weathered
   Medium: Mixed Media
   Collection: Selected Works
   Availability: Portfolio review
   Description: A distressed love study where teal, red, and worn texture meet in a print-like field. The piece feels handled, layered, and intentionally imperfect.

6. You Are Priceless
   Medium: Lettering
   Collection: Selected Works
   Availability: Portfolio review
   Description: A warm lettering piece with a simple affirmation at its center. The script keeps the message personal without turning it into decoration alone.

7. Red Current
   Medium: Texture Study
   Collection: Selected Works
   Availability: Portfolio review
   Description: A horizontal texture piece built around speed, friction, and a strong red field. Its movement gives the surface a sense of heat and pressure.

8. Rainline Notes
   Medium: Ink Study
   Collection: Selected Works
   Availability: Portfolio review
   Description: Vertical marks gather like weather, notation, or a passing rhythm. The piece uses restraint and repetition instead of a fixed image.

9. Infinite Love, Blue Variation
   Medium: Lettering Study
   Collection: Selected Works
   Availability: Portfolio review
   Description: A cooler variation on the Infinite Love mark, softened through blue and violet tones. It shows how the same phrase can shift when the atmosphere changes.

10. Blue Name Current
   Medium: Signature Study
   Collection: Selected Works
   Availability: Portfolio review
   Description: A layered blue surface with a quiet name-form embedded inside the field. The signature becomes part of the current rather than sitting on top of it.

11. Blessed Water
   Medium: Lettering
   Collection: Selected Works
   Availability: Portfolio review
   Description: A gentle script piece carried by open space and blue wash. The composition leaves room around the words so the lettering can breathe.

12. Soul Current
   Medium: Ink Study
   Collection: Selected Works
   Availability: Portfolio review
   Description: A restrained blue field where lettering and surface begin to merge. The piece is more about trace and movement than a finished statement.

13. Washed Out
   Medium: Digital Lettering
   Collection: Selected Works
   Availability: Portfolio review
   Description: Expressive lettering moves across a bright digital wash. The contrast between the loose mark and the luminous field gives the piece its tension.

14. Inkspirations Studio Mark
   Medium: Brand Mark
   Collection: Selected Works
   Availability: Portfolio review
   Description: A hand-drawn studio mark in the Inkspirations blue language. It anchors the portfolio as both identity work and personal lettering.

15. Lest We Forget
   Medium: Digital Collage
   Collection: Selected Works
   Availability: Portfolio review
   Description: A compact memorial-style collage built with distressed color, light, and layered imagery. The piece holds its message through compression rather than scale.

16. Studio Blue Identity Card
   Medium: Identity Design
   Collection: Selected Works
   Availability: Portfolio review
   Description: A polished Inkspirations Studios identity card using the house blue as its main field. It presents the studio voice in a clean, client-facing format.

17. Inkspirations Logo Lockup
   Medium: Identity Design
   Collection: Selected Works
   Availability: Portfolio review
   Description: A clean logo lockup pairing calligraphic emphasis with a direct studio name. The piece shows the brand system in its simplest public-facing form.

18. Say No
   Medium: Typographic Poster
   Collection: Selected Works
   Availability: Portfolio review
   Description: A stark poster study built from scale, contrast, and compression. The direct wording gives the composition its structure.

19. Small Town Teacher
   Medium: Identity Mark
   Collection: Selected Works
   Availability: Portfolio review
   Description: A compact identity mark with friendly typography and a warm palette. It shows a softer side of the studio system while staying clear and readable.

## Contact

Portfolio inquiries: r.marleton@gmail.com
